creator.name: 异怪
creator.desc: The item was created by 异怪s in ancient times, possibly for the use of favored 类人生物 thralls. When seen from the corner of the eye, the item seems to be moving.

creator.name: 人类
creator.desc: The item was created during the heyday of a fallen 人类 kingdom, or it is tied to a 人类 of legend. It might hold writing in a forgotten tongue or symbols whose significance is lost to the 年龄s.

creator.name: 天界生物
creator.desc: The weapon is half the normal weight and in抄写员d with 专长hered wings, 太阳s, and other symbols of good. 魔族s find the item’s presence repulsive.

creator.name: 龙类
creator.desc: This item is made from scales and 禽爪 shed by a dragon. Perhaps it incorporates precious metals and 宝石s from the dragon’s hoard. It grows slightly warm when within 120 feet of a dragon.

creator.name: 卓尔
creator.desc: The item is half the normal weight. It is black and in抄写员d with spiders and webs in honor of Lolth. It might function poorly, or disintegrate, if exposed to 太阳light for 1 minute or more.

creator.name: 矮人
creator.desc: The item is durable and has Dwarven runes worked into its design. It might be associated with a clan that would like to see it returned to their ancestral halls.

creator.name: 元素生物 Air
creator.desc: The item is half the normal weight and feels hollow. If it’s made of fabric, it is diaphanous.

creator.name: 元素生物 Earth
creator.desc: This item might be crafted from stone. Any cloth or 皮甲 elements are studded with finely polished rock.

creator.name: 元素生物 火焰
creator.desc: This item is warm to the touch, and any metal parts are crafted from black iron. 印记城s of 喷火 cover its surface. Shades of red and orange are the prominent colors.

creator.name: 元素生物 Water
creator.desc: Lustrous fish scales replace 皮甲 or cloth on this item, and metal portions are instead crafted from seashells and worked coral as hard as any metal.

creator.name: 精灵
creator.desc: The item is half the normal weight. It is adorned with symbols of 自然: leaves, vines, 星辰s, and the like.

creator.name: 精类
creator.desc: The item is exquisitely crafted from the finest materials and glows with a pale radiance in 月亮light, shedding dim light in a 5-foot radius. Any metal in the item is silver or mithral, rather than iron or steel.

creator.name: 魔族
creator.desc: The item is made of black iron or horn in抄写员d with runes, and any cloth or 皮甲 components are crafted from the 皮甲 of 魔族s. It is warm to the touch and 专长ures leering faces or vile runes engraved on its surface. 天界生物s find the item’s presence repulsive.

creator.name: 巨人
creator.desc: The item is 大型r than normal and was crafted by giants for use by their 小型er allies.

creator.name: 侏儒
creator.desc: The item is crafted to appear ordinary, and it might look worn. It could also incorporate gears and mechanical components, even if these aren’t essential to the item’s function.

creator.name: 亡灵
creator.desc: The item incorporates im年龄ry of death, such as bones and 骷髅s, and it might be crafted from parts of corpses. It feels cold to the touch.

history.name: Arcane
history.desc: This item was created for an ancient order of spellcasters and bears the order’s symbol.

history.name: Bane
history.desc: This item was created by the foes of a particular culture or kind of creature. If the culture or creatures are still around, they might recognize the item and single out the bearer as an enemy.

history.name: Heroic
history.desc: A great hero once wielded this item. Anyone who’s familiar with the item’s history expects great deeds from the new owner.

history.name: Ornament
history.desc: The item was created to honor a special occasion. Inset 宝石stones, gold or platinum inlays, and gold or silver filigree adorn its surface.

history.name: Prophecy
history.desc: The item 专长ures in a prophecy: its bearer is destined to play a 钥匙 职能 in future events. Someone else who wants to play that 职能 might try to steal the item, or someone who wants to prevent the prophecy from being fulfilled might try to kill the item’s bearer.

history.name: Religious
history.desc: This item was used in religious ceremonies dedicated to a particular deity. It has holy symbols worked into it. The god’s followers might try to persuade its owner to donate it to a temple, steal the item for thems精灵, or celebrate its use by a 牧师 or 圣武士 of the same deity.

history.name: Sinister
history.desc: This item is linked to a deed of great evil, such as a massacre or an assassination. It might have a name or be closely associated with a villain who used it. Anyone familiar with the item’s history is likely to treat it and its owner with suspicion.

history.name: Symbol of Power
history.desc: This item was once used as part of royal regalia or as a badge of high office. Its former owner or that person’s descendants might desire it, or someone might mistakenly assume its new owner is the item’s legitimate 继承人.

property.name: Beacon
property.desc: The bearer can use a 附赠动作 to cause the item to shed bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet, or to extinguish the light.

property.name: Compass
property.desc: The wielder can use an action to learn which way is north.

property.name: Conscientious
property.desc: When the bearer of this item contem全身板甲s or undertakes a malevolent act, the item enhances pangs of conscience.

property.name: Delver
property.desc: While underground, the bearer of this item always knows the item’s depth below the surface and the direction to the nearest staircase, 攻城槌p, or other path leading upward.

property.name: 警卫ian
property.desc: The item whispers warnings to its bearer, granting a +2 bonus to initiative if the bearer isn’t 失能.

property.name: Harmonious
property.desc: Attuning to this item takes only 1 minute.

property.name: Hidden Mes智者
property.desc: A mes智者 is hidden somewhere on the item. It might be visible only at a certain time of the year, under the light of one phase of the 月亮, or in a specific location.

property.name: 钥匙
property.desc: The item is used to unlock a container, chamber, vault, or other entryway.

property.name: 语言
property.desc: The bearer can speak and understand a 语言 of the DM’s choice while the item is on the bearer’s person.

property.name: Sentinel
property.desc: Choose a kind of creature that is an enemy of the item’s 创造者. This item glows faintly when such creatures are within 120 feet of it.

property.name: Song Craft
property.desc: Whenever this item is struck or is used to strike a foe, its bearer hears a fragment of an ancient song.

property.name: Strange Material
property.desc: The item was created from a material that is bizarre given its purpose. Its durability is unaffected.

property.name: Temperate
property.desc: The bearer suffers no harm in temperatures as cold as −20 degrees Fahrenheit or as warm as 120 degrees Fahrenheit.

property.name: Unbreakable
property.desc: The item can’t be broken. Special means must be used to destroy it.

property.name: War Leader
property.desc: The bearer can use an action to cause his or her voice to carry clearly for up to 300 feet until the end of the bearer’s next turn.

property.name: Waterborne
property.desc: This item floats on water and other liquids. Its bearer has 优势 on 力量 (运动) checks to swim.

property.name: Wicked
property.desc: When the bearer is presented with an opportunity to act in a s精灵ish or malevolent way, the item heightens the bearer’s urge to do so.

property.name: Illusion
property.desc: The item is imbued with illusion magic, allowing its bearer to alter the item’s 外表 in minor ways. Such alterations don’t change how the item is worn, carried, or wielded, and they have no effect on its other magical properties. For example, the wearer could make a red robe appear blue, or make a gold ring look like it’s made of ivory. The item reverts to its true 外表 when no one is carrying or wearing it.

quirk.name: Blissful
quirk.desc: While in possession of the item, the bearer feels fortunate and optimistic about what the future holds. Butterflies and other harmless creatures might frolic in the item’s presence.

quirk.name: Confident
quirk.desc: The item helps its bearer feel s精灵-assured.

quirk.name: Covetous
quirk.desc: The item’s bearer becomes obsessed with material wealth.

quirk.name: Frail
quirk.desc: The item crumbles, frays, chips, or cracks slightly when wielded, worn, or activated. This quirk has no effect on its properties, but if the item has seen much use, it looks decrepit.

quirk.name: Hungry
quirk.desc: This item’s magical properties function only if fresh blood from a 类人生物 has been applied to it within the past 24 hours. It needs only a drop to activate.

quirk.name: Loud
quirk.desc: The item makes a loud noise—such as a clang, a shout, or a resonating gong—when used.

quirk.name: Metamorphic
quirk.desc: The item periodically and randomly alters its 外表 in slight ways. The bearer has no control over these minor alterations, which have no effect on the item’s use.

quirk.name: Muttering
quirk.desc: The item grumbles and mutters. A creature who listens carefully to the item might learn something useful.

quirk.name: Painful
quirk.desc: The bearer experiences a harmless flash of pain when using the item.

quirk.name: Possessive
quirk.desc: The item demands attunement when first wielded or worn, and it doesn’t allow its bearer to attune to other items. (Other items already attuned to the bearer remain so until their attunement ends.)

quirk.name: Repulsive
quirk.desc: The bearer feels a sense of distaste when in contact with the item, and continues to sense discomfort while bearing it.

quirk.name: Slothful
quirk.desc: The bearer of this item feels slothful and lethargic. While attuned to the item, the bearer requires 10 hours to finish a 长休.
